---
applyTo: "README.md,docs/**/*.md,**/*.adr.md,**/ADR*.md"
excludeAgent: "code-review"
---
# Documentation instructions

- Keep docs aligned with current code and intended design.
- Prefer short operational explanations over vague architecture language.
- When behavior, contracts, or migration paths change, update the relevant doc in the same change if practical.
- Record important tradeoffs and failure behavior, not just the happy path.
- Use bullets and headings to make docs scannable.
